strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple senior roles, directly matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development at re:cinq, satisfying the AI agent development requirement
Consistent fullstack delivery (React, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) across 10+ years and diverse domains
concerns: Active career gap since October 2025 with no stated return timeline or project activity
No explicit NestJS experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin/Java exposure is minimal and incidental (robotic arms tooling), leaving the secondary stack requirement largely unmet
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned fullstack engineer whose core TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure experience maps closely to the role's primary requirements, and his recent AI agent and MCP work at re:cinq addresses an increasingly important part of the stack. The main gaps are NestJS (absent from the resume) and Kotlin/Java (only touched peripherally), both of which are listed requirements; the current career gap also warrants a conversation to understand context and re-engagement readiness.
